energy.label: Arcane Power
energy.description: Arcane energy available to maintain wards, lifts, lights, and waterworks.
energy.mechanism_description: Arcane power is drawn from ley channels and regulated through civic wardstones.

glossary.quick_explain: Arcane power is the civic energy that keeps the city's magical systems alive.
glossary.why_it_matters: If ley flow drops, multiple magical services begin to fail together.

tutorial.player_hint: Arcane power is this scenario's version of a core operating capacity.
common_misreadings: Not all magic in the setting draws from the civic ley network.

water.label: Enchanted Waterworks
water.description: Usable water available through the city's magical channels and reservoirs.
water.mechanism_description: Waterworks depend on arcane power, repairs, and stable ward control.

glossary.quick_explain: The waterworks are the magical systems that keep usable water moving through the city.
glossary.why_it_matters: If the waterworks fail, health and trust drop quickly.

food.label: Food Stores
food.description: Arcology food reserves and distribution support.
food.mechanism_description: Food security depends on powered lifts, labor, and protected storage.

glossary.quick_explain: Food stores include both reserves and the systems that move them through the city.
glossary.why_it_matters: Food weakness quickly harms health and civic stability.

glossary.quick_explain: Health shows how well residents can endure strain and disruption.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low health weakens labor and raises visible crisis pressure.

workforce.label: Civic Crews
workforce.description: Available labor for maintenance, ward repair, and logistics.
workforce.mechanism_description: Crews depend on health, morale, and whether the city's institutions can still coordinate them.

glossary.quick_explain: Civic crews are the labor needed to keep the city functioning.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low crew capacity slows every repair and recovery effort.

treasury.label: Civic Reserves
treasury.description: Available funds and stores for emergency action.

glossary.quick_explain: Civic reserves are the money and stored value the city can still spend on crisis response.

trust.label: Public Confidence
trust.description: Whether residents still believe the ward council can keep the city safe.

glossary.quick_explain: Public confidence measures whether residents still believe the city's magical institutions are protecting them.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low confidence makes every visible failure more dangerous.

legitimacy.label: Council Mandate
legitimacy.description: The accepted right of the ward council to direct emergency action.

glossary.quick_explain: Council mandate is the city's belief that its leadership still has the right to act decisively.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low mandate makes stronger measures harder to sustain.

logistics.label: Lift and Canal Throughput
logistics.description: How much supply, labor, and repair activity the arcology can still move through its systems.
logistics.mechanism_description: Throughput depends on ward stability, crews, and working magical infrastructure.

glossary.quick_explain: Lift and canal throughput shows whether the arcology can still move what it needs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak throughput slows every fix and every delivery.

water_delivery.label: Enchanted Waterworks
water_delivery.description: Reliable water service through magical civic systems.

glossary.quick_explain: The waterworks are the function residents depend on, not just the water stock.
glossary.why_it_matters: Waterworks failure quickly harms health and trust.

heating_access.label: Ward Heat
heating_access.description: Reliable warmth through civic wards and powered districts.

glossary.quick_explain: Ward heat tracks whether the city's magical heating systems still function.
glossary.why_it_matters: Loss of heat quickly turns a systems problem into a visible crisis.

food_distribution.label: Storehouse Delivery
food_distribution.description: Movement of food through storehouses, lifts, and district routes.

glossary.quick_explain: Storehouse delivery matters because reserves still have to reach people.
glossary.why_it_matters: Distribution weakness creates shortages even where stock remains.

transport_access.label: Lift Access
transport_access.description: Movement through lifts, canals, and district corridors.
transport_access.failure_text: Lift access may bottleneck relief and repair work.

glossary.quick_explain: Lift access tracks whether the city can still move what it needs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak lift access makes every repair slower.

medical_care.label: Healing Care
medical_care.description: Capacity to care for the injured and sick.
medical_care.failure_text: Healing care may become less reliable.

glossary.quick_explain: Healing care reflects whether the city's vulnerable groups are still protected.
glossary.why_it_matters: Visible healing failures damage public confidence.

emergency_response.label: Ward Response
emergency_response.description: How quickly the city can react to new danger.

glossary.quick_explain: Ward response combines power, crews, reserves, and mandate.
glossary.why_it_matters: Slow response makes magical failure feel much more dangerous.

public_order.label: City Stability
public_order.description: Visible civic stability across the arcology.

glossary.quick_explain: City stability tracks whether fear is spilling into visible disruption.
glossary.why_it_matters: Instability makes every other system harder to protect.

fuel.label: Spell Components
fuel.description: Material inputs used to stabilize the ley network.

materials.label: Ward Materials
materials.description: Repair materials for canals, wards, and lifts.

labor_hours.label: Guild Crew Hours
labor_hours.description: Skilled labor for maintenance and repair.

energy_instability.label: Ley power may fail soon
energy_instability.summary: Arcane power is at risk of dropping below what the city needs.
energy_instability.if_ignored: If ley power fails, wards, waterworks, and lift towers may weaken together.
energy_instability.mitigation_hint: Import arcane power or spell components first.

water_shortage.label: The waterworks may break down
water_shortage.summary: Enchanted water delivery is under strain.
water_shortage.if_ignored: If the waterworks weaken further, health and trust may fall next.
water_shortage.mitigation_hint: Protect arcane power, crews, and repair materials.

food_collapse.label: Food stores are running low
food_collapse.summary: Storehouse reserves and lift delivery are under strain.
food_collapse.if_ignored: If food keeps falling, health and stability may worsen.

budget_erosion.label: Civic reserves are under pressure
budget_erosion.summary: Emergency spending is shrinking the city's remaining room to act.
budget_erosion.if_ignored: If reserves keep falling, future response choices will narrow.
budget_erosion.mitigation_hint: Use targeted relief and avoid waste.

unrest_spike.label: Crew strain is rising
unrest_spike.summary: Fatigue and visible instability are putting pressure on city crews.
unrest_spike.if_ignored: If strain rises further, repairs and services may slow together.
unrest_spike.mitigation_hint: Protect visible services and keep crews supplied.

institutional_breakdown.label: The ward system may jam up
institutional_breakdown.summary: Canals, lifts, and civic wards are under structural stress.
institutional_breakdown.if_ignored: If institutions stall, supplies and repairs may stop reaching districts.

political_stalemate.label: Support for strong action is weakening
political_stalemate.summary: The ward council's political support is becoming harder to hold together.
political_stalemate.if_ignored: If support falls further, stronger measures may become unavailable.
political_stalemate.mitigation_hint: Choose visible relief the council can still defend.

public_trust_collapse.label: Public confidence is slipping
public_trust_collapse.summary: Residents are losing confidence in the city's magical institutions.
public_trust_collapse.if_ignored: If confidence falls, backlash and instability may spread faster.
public_trust_collapse.mitigation_hint: Protect the services residents feel most directly.

canal_households.label: Canal District Households
canal_households.description: Residents relying on working wards, water, and food delivery.

wardsmith_crews.label: Wardsmith Crews
wardsmith_crews.description: Skilled workers keeping the city's magical systems functioning.

infirmary_patients.label: Infirmary Patients
infirmary_patients.description: Vulnerable people needing reliable heat, water, and healing care.
